name: dispatch-time-plot-ready-active-promotion
description: warren-dfff / pl-e381 step 2: dispatch-time ready->active Plot promotion lives in src/plan-runs/plot-appender.ts as PlanRunPlotActivator + defaultPlanRunPlotActivator (open UserPlotClient, read(), if status==='ready' setStatus('active') else skip) + promotePlotToActiveOnDispatch fire-and-log wrapper logging plan_run.plot_activated (info) / plan_run.plot_activation_skipped (warn) / plan_run.plot_activation_failed (warn). Mirrors defaultPlotStatusSetter/autoTransitionPlotToDone in plot-transition.ts (the active->done auto-done side). Wired via optional planRunPlotActivator seam on ServerDeps, called right after emitPlanRunDispatchedToPlot inside the plotId guard in BOTH handlers/plan-runs.ts and handlers/plot-plan-runs.ts. Auto-done guard stays ===active; promotion just makes active reachable via dispatch as well as operator action. Note: a verbose ServerDeps doc-comment pushed src/server/types.ts past the 500-line check:size ceiling — keep new seam doc-comments terse.

content: isFatalHttpError (src/plan-runs/merge-gate.ts) is module-internal but consumed by TWO arms: checkParentRunMerged (parent gate, merge-gate.ts) and pollMergeState (child gate, in-flight.ts). Any change to the fatal-HTTP set needs regression tests in BOTH files — parent-gate cases in coordinator.gating.test.ts and child-gate cases in coordinator.completion.test.ts. Narrowed to 404/410 only (warren-eccd / pl-30ae): 401/403/429 are 'cannot verify right now' and fall through to keep-waiting in both arms, bounded by the merge-wait budget (warren-3937); only 404/410 (PR genuinely gone) fail with parent_pr_not_merged / pr_closed_without_merge.
